Name: LOOK_AT_HEAD_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the parameters relating to look-at cameras for heads.

Fields.Name: Turning Performance
Fields.Description: The interpolation performance when LookAt is enabled or disabled. In % per second.

Fields.Name: Vertical Correction %
Fields.Description: The vertical correction rate to apply to the target angle.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Correction %
Fields.Description: The horizontal correction rate to apply to the target angle.

Fields.Name: Minimum Vertical Angle
Fields.Description: The minimum LookAt angle on the vertical axis.

Fields.Name: Maximum Vertical Angle
Fields.Description: The maximum LookAt angle on the vertical axis.

Fields.Name: Minimum Horizontal Angle
Fields.Description: The minimum LookAt angle on the horizontal axis.

Fields.Name: Maximum Horizontal Angle
Fields.Description: The maximum LookAt angle on the horizontal axis.
